basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Chowkidar and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Specialist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, Dental A/T/H, Chowkidar
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Specialist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, Dental A/T/H, Chowkidar Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.echs.gov.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS in Specialty concerned/DNB, MBBS, BDS, B Pharmacy or 10+2 with Science stream (PCB) and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy, GNM Diploma /Class 1 Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces), Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces), 8th Class or GD Trade for Armed Forces Personnel
qualification.details: Medical Specialist: MD/MS in Specialty concerned/DNB Medical Officer: MBBS Dental Officer: BDS Pharmacist: B Pharmacy or 10+2 with Science stream (PCB) and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy Nursing Asst: GNM Diploma /Class 1 Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces) Dental A/T/H: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces) Chowkidar: 8th Class or GD Trade for Armed Forces Personnel

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Specialist: MD/MS in Specialty concerned/DNB Medical Officer: MBBS Dental Officer: BDS Pharmacist: B Pharmacy or 10+2 with Science stream (PCB) and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy Nursing Asst: GNM Diploma /Class 1 Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces) Dental A/T/H: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces) Chowkidar: 8th Class or GD Trade for Armed Forces Personnel

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various posts including Medical Specialist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, Dental A/T/H, and Chowkidar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for ECHS Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Medical Specialist post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Medical Specialist post in ECHS Recruitment 2026 is Rs 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 8th Class for Chowkidar to MD/MS for Medical Specialist. Please refer to the detailed notification for specific post requirements.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the ECHS application form?
faq.answer: The ECHS application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the interview date for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The interview date for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 06th August 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which state and city is this ECHS recruitment for?
faq.answer: This ECHS recruitment is for the state of Odisha, specifically in the city of Gopalpur, with the pincode 761052.
